# ContactItemPage

**Structure**

A fixed offset into enumerating all contact items.

## Declaration

```swift
struct ContactItemPage
```

## Overview

You can break an enumeration of all contact items into multiple pages to reduce the memory constraints on the system. During the enumeration, the [doc://com.apple.ContactProvider/documentation/ContactProvider/ContactItemPage/generationMarker] must not change. Update the [doc://com.apple.ContactProvider/documentation/ContactProvider/ContactItemPage/offset] to reflect progress so you can resume the enumeration.

## Creating a contact item page

- **init(generationMarker:offset:)**: Creates a contact item page with the given generation marker and offset.

## Supporting paging

- **generationMarker**: A value specific to your data source identifying the database generation when enumeration of content started.
- **offset**: An offset from the page’s generation marker.
- **initialPage**: A static value the system uses to indicate the start of a new content enumeration.

## Ending enumeration

- **didFinishEnumeratingContent(upTo:)**: Finishes the content enumeration to the observer.
- **didFinishEnumeratingPage(upTo:)**: Marks a page of items as completed.
- **didFinishEnumeratingContentWithError(_:)**: Finishes the content enumeration with an error, indicating failure, to the observer.

## Conforms To

- Decodable
- Encodable
- Equatable
